{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Ball Award
|class_id=20069
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The Golden Ball Award is a film and television award festival in Murika held in the form of a formal dinner. Organized by the Huullywood Foreign Press Association, the event is held annually and features a total of 24 awards, voted on by 96 journalists.
|fame=17
|art=15
|fth=12
|civ=31
|tech=15
|ss1=Lottery Purple Orbs turn to Orange by +0.5%
|ss2=Lottery Purple Orbs turn to Orange by +1%
|ss3=Lottery Purple Orbs turn to Orange by +1.5%
|ss4=Lottery Purple Orbs turn to Orange by +1.5%
|ss7=Lottery Purple Orbs turn to Orange by +1.5%<br> (Awakened)
}}
